microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: Microsoft Purview Audit (Standard) retains audit records for 180 days by default in commercial tenants.
Copilot audit records use CopilotInteraction for Microsoft-developed Copilot experiences, and ConnectedAIAppInteraction or AIAppInteraction for custom or third-party AI app interactions.
ConnectedAIAppInteraction and AIAppInteraction records require Purview pay-as-you-go billing when organizations audit custom or third-party AI applications.
Microsoft Graph AuditLogsQuery APIs use workload-scoped AuditLogsQuery permissions or AuditLogsQuery.Read.All for least-privileged audit query access.
Classic eDiscovery experiences are retired for commercial cloud tenants, and the unified Microsoft Purview eDiscovery experience is the supported path.
Microsoft Purview eDiscovery hold propagation can take up to 24 hours, so readiness checks should allow that synchronization window.
Microsoft 365 provides immutable data and preservation capabilities, but organizations still need tenant-specific controls and legal review for regulatory attestation.

licenses: Microsoft 365 E5, Microsoft Purview Suite, or Microsoft 365 E5 eDiscovery and Audit add-on
Purview pay-as-you-go enabled when custom or third-party AI app interaction auditing is required
roles: Audit Reader (View-Only Audit Logs) or equivalent role group
Audit Manager (Audit Logs) when changing audit configuration
features: Unified Microsoft Purview eDiscovery experience enabled
Purview retention policies and labels available
capacityRequirements: One lab tenant with representative sample records
Operator access to Purview and Microsoft 365 admin portals
dataRequirements: No production secrets or customer identifiers in exported artifacts
prerequisites.notes: This contract is read-only template guidance and does not authorize tenant mutations.

steps.intent: Confirm Purview Audit tier prerequisites and billing model alignment for selected workloads.
steps.expected: Audit (Standard or Premium) prerequisites are documented, and pay-as-you-go is documented when ConnectedAIAppInteraction or AIAppInteraction is in scope.
steps.locator: Microsoft Purview portal > Audit > Search and Microsoft 365 admin center > Billing

readBack.expectation: Evidence shows licensing state or a blocker that prevents audit validation.

steps.intent: Verify role assignments for audit and eDiscovery operators before validation.
steps.expected: Required roles are documented; missing role assignment is recorded as a blocking condition.
steps.operatorNote: Record role assignment confirmation and attach screenshot or access-denied proof.

readBack.expectation: Operator attestation includes PASS or BLOCKED rationale.

phases.title: Run read-only audit and readiness checks

steps.intent: Validate that Purview Audit search route is available for Copilot record types.
steps.expected: Search route allows filtering for CopilotInteraction and returns a query-capable interface even when result counts are zero.

readBack.expectation: Screenshot proves route and record type filter availability.

steps.intent: Run the solution monitoring script in documentation-first mode to produce representative control status output.
steps.expected: Script output includes controls 3.1, 3.2, 3.3, 3.11, and 3.12 with no tenant mutation.

readBack.expectation: Output confirms control statuses and findings for representative validation.

steps.intent: Validate unified eDiscovery case and hold workflow availability for investigation readiness.
steps.expected: Portal exposes case and hold workflow with People/data source terminology, and operator notes map People checks to custodian API terminology when applicable.

readBack.expectation: Evidence confirms case/hold workflow availability or documents a blocker.

phases.title: Validate evidence package and disposition rules

steps.intent: Generate representative evidence artifacts and package metadata for schema and integrity checks.
steps.expected: Export-Evidence writes JSON artifacts and SHA-256 companions with package-relative artifact paths.

readBack.reference: Export-Evidence output and generated package files
readBack.expectation: Package includes audit, retention, and eDiscovery artifacts plus SHA-256 files.

steps.intent: Apply disposition rules when licensing, role access, or no-audit-data conditions prevent PASS.
steps.expected: Disposition is BLOCKED with explicit source evidence for licensing gap, role gap, or no-audit-data state.
steps.operatorNote: If no Copilot audit data appears, document query window, latency allowance, and blocker rationale instead of asserting failure.

readBack.expectation: Disposition decision references source evidence and read-back artifacts.

phases.title: Confirm no tenant mutation cleanup is required

steps.intent: Record cleanup attestation for read-only execution.
steps.expected: Operator confirms no tenant mutation occurred and no rollback action is required.
steps.operatorNote: This contract has no mutable actions; cleanup is documentation-only.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms read-only execution with mutations array empty.

requiredArtifacts.description: Purview Audit search route screenshot showing CopilotInteraction search capability.
Representative retention-policy-state artifact generated by Export-Evidence.
Unified eDiscovery case and hold workflow screenshot with People/data source context.
Blocking evidence for licensing, role access, or no-audit-data conditions with query window notes.
Microsoft source citation bundle mapped to each accepted disposition decision.
Operator read-back and disposition attestation signed for the validation run.
